channel.title: friendly.atheist TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from friendly.atheist

item.title: A proposed law in Arizona would *require* kids to say the Pledge of Allegiance unless their parents say otherwise. It’s blatantly unconstitutional. Will lawmakers care? #atheism #atheist #pledgeofallegiance
item.description: A proposed law in Arizona would *require* kids to say the Pledge of Allegiance unless their parents say otherwise. It’s blatantly unconstitutional. Will lawmakers care? #atheism #atheist #pledgeofallegiance

item.title: Instead of telling the truth about After School Satan Club, the Christian Action Network lied to further its own narrative. #atheism #atheist #satanictemple
item.description: Instead of telling the truth about After School Satan Club, the Christian Action Network lied to further its own narrative. #atheism #atheist #satanictemple

item.title: Mid Vermont Christian School got the punishment it deserved for putting faith-based bigotry over basic decency. #atheism #atheist #lgbt #transgender
item.description: Mid Vermont Christian School got the punishment it deserved for putting faith-based bigotry over basic decency. #atheism #atheist #lgbt #transgender

item.title: The Dalai Lama’s public apology for telling a child to suck his tongue didnt go far enough. #atheism #atheist #dalailama
item.description: The Dalai Lama’s public apology for telling a child to suck his tongue didnt go far enough. #atheism #atheist #dalailama

item.title: Texas lawmakers want to allow public schools to replace trained counselors and social workers with untrained Christian chaplains! It’s a mental health disaster in the making. #atheism #atheist #texas
item.description: Texas lawmakers want to allow public schools to replace trained counselors and social workers with untrained Christian chaplains! It’s a mental health disaster in the making. #atheism #atheist #texas

item.title: Glenn Hill and Phyllis Hill didnt get the sex ed they needed, but now they’re trying to pass on their ignorance to othet Christians. #atheism #atheist #sex
item.description: Glenn Hill and Phyllis Hill didnt get the sex ed they needed, but now they’re trying to pass on their ignorance to othet Christians. #atheism #atheist #sex

item.title: The horrific story involving the cult of Pastor Paul Mackenzie is troubling, but let’s not pretend this sort of thing only happens in other countries. #atheism #atheist
item.description: The horrific story involving the cult of Pastor Paul Mackenzie is troubling, but let’s not pretend this sort of thing only happens in other countries. #atheism #atheist

item.title: The youngest Americans are the least likely churchgoers we’ve ever seen in this country. Full video on YouTube!#atheism #atheist
item.description: The youngest Americans are the least likely churchgoers we’ve ever seen in this country. Full video on YouTube!#atheism #atheist

item.title: Two scripted videos about "disfellowshipping" will not be shown to Jehovah’s Witnesses during their 2023 Regional Convention. Here's what they showed and why they were censored. #jehovahswitness #jehovahswitnesses #atheist #atheism
item.description: Two scripted videos about "disfellowshipping" will not be shown to Jehovah’s Witnesses during their 2023 Regional Convention. Here's what they showed and why they were censored. #jehovahswitness #jehovahswitnesses #atheist #atheism

item.title: Catholics recently descended upon a city in Missouri in order to catch a glimpse of the corpse of Sister Wilhelmina Lancaster. What is going on?! #atheist #atheism #catholic
item.description: Catholics recently descended upon a city in Missouri in order to catch a glimpse of the corpse of Sister Wilhelmina Lancaster. What is going on?! #atheist #atheism #catholic

item.title: Why did two Christian parents, both of whom were home-schooled, choose to send their four kids to public school? Because they discovered three lies conservative Christians believe about public schools. Watch the full video on YouTube! #atheist #atheism
item.description: Why did two Christian parents, both of whom were home-schooled, choose to send their four kids to public school? Because they discovered three lies conservative Christians believe about public schools. Watch the full video on YouTube! #atheist #atheism

item.title: A new law in Florida will allow Christian prayers over the public address system at the start of high-profile public high school athletic events. Ron DeSantis just injected his religion into high school sports! Full video on YouTube! #atheist #atheism #F
item.description: A new law in Florida will allow Christian prayers over the public address system at the start of high-profile public high school athletic events. Ron DeSantis just injected his religion into high school sports! Full video on YouTube! #atheist #atheism #F

item.title: One man and one woman are NOT the only kinds of marriages in the Bible. It’s much more disturbing than that. #atheist #atheism #lgbtq
item.description: One man and one woman are NOT the only kinds of marriages in the Bible. It’s much more disturbing than that. #atheist #atheism #lgbtq

item.title: In December of 2021, attorney Richard Trahant discovered that a chaplain at a private Catholic school—Brother Martin High School in New Orleans, Louisiana—had previously been accused of misconduct. Trahant contacted the school and informed them of what h
item.description: In December of 2021, attorney Richard Trahant discovered that a chaplain at a private Catholic school—Brother Martin High School in New Orleans, Louisiana—had previously been accused of misconduct. Trahant contacted the school and informed them of what h

item.title: Dr. Kirk Milhoan says measles and polio vaccines should be optional. He’s wrong. But he may shape vaccine policy for the country thanks to RFK, Jr.
item.description: Dr. Kirk Milhoan says measles and polio vaccines should be optional. He’s wrong. But he may shape vaccine policy for the country thanks to RFK, Jr.

item.title: A woman in Nashville, Tennessee says her sterilization surgery was blocked… because the Catholic hospital she was at, Ascension St. Thomas Midtown, believed they had to protect her “sacred fertility.” #catholichospital #abortion #sterilization
item.description: A woman in Nashville, Tennessee says her sterilization surgery was blocked… because the Catholic hospital she was at, Ascension St. Thomas Midtown, believed they had to protect her “sacred fertility.” #catholichospital #abortion #sterilization

item.title: Pastor Nathan Peternel's son is going to jail. The pastor also asked children inappropriate questions about their personal lives. But he's now stepping down from the pulpit because of what he did with his wife in the privacy of his own bedroom. Make it ma
item.description: Pastor Nathan Peternel's son is going to jail. The pastor also asked children inappropriate questions about their personal lives. But he's now stepping down from the pulpit because of what he did with his wife in the privacy of his own bedroom. Make it ma

item.title: The good news? Kansas wants to make priests mandated reporters! The bad news? There’s a loophole that would still allow them to keep *certain* secrets… #MandatedReporters #catholic
item.description: The good news? Kansas wants to make priests mandated reporters! The bad news? There’s a loophole that would still allow them to keep *certain* secrets… #MandatedReporters #catholic

item.title: Evangelical Pastor John Hagee played a PRO-WAR TRAILER on Sunday before delivering a sermon defending Trump's actions against Iran. Because he thinks the only way to defeat THEIR religious zealots is with OUR religious zealots. #OperationEpicFury #Trump
item.description: Evangelical Pastor John Hagee played a PRO-WAR TRAILER on Sunday before delivering a sermon defending Trump's actions against Iran. Because he thinks the only way to defeat THEIR religious zealots is with OUR religious zealots. #OperationEpicFury #Trump

item.title: That viral story about a military leader saying the Iran War is all about Armageddon has a major flaw… #IranWar #PeteHegseth #ChristianNationalism
item.description: That viral story about a military leader saying the Iran War is all about Armageddon has a major flaw… #IranWar #PeteHegseth #ChristianNationalism

item.title: A Bible bill in Texas was meant to create time during the school day for students to pray and read their holy book. Turns out almost no school district wants to play along. #Bible #Texas #ChristianNationalism
item.description: A Bible bill in Texas was meant to create time during the school day for students to pray and read their holy book. Turns out almost no school district wants to play along. #Bible #Texas #ChristianNationalism

item.title: Pastor Randy Caldwell just offered up the Worst Christian Theory you’ll ever hear about why fetuses must be protected at all costs. #abortion #RandyCaldwell #God #atheist #atheism
item.description: Pastor Randy Caldwell just offered up the Worst Christian Theory you’ll ever hear about why fetuses must be protected at all costs. #abortion #RandyCaldwell #God #atheist #atheism

item.title: Rhode Island's Attorney General Peter Neronha just released his report following an investigation into the Catholic Diocese of Providence. But even that report doesn't tell the whole story because the Catholic Church refused to help him any more than he c
item.description: Rhode Island's Attorney General Peter Neronha just released his report following an investigation into the Catholic Diocese of Providence. But even that report doesn't tell the whole story because the Catholic Church refused to help him any more than he c

item.title: This Washington Post article by Aaron Renn says we need MORE evangelical Christians in positions of power. As if the rest of us haven't suffered enough already... #AaronRenn #ChristianNationalism #Politics #Religion #Atheist
item.description: This Washington Post article by Aaron Renn says we need MORE evangelical Christians in positions of power. As if the rest of us haven't suffered enough already... #AaronRenn #ChristianNationalism #Politics #Religion #Atheist

item.title: I’ve been in Washington, D.C. for a few minutes and, oh, what is this… #washingtondc #politics #trump
item.description: I’ve been in Washington, D.C. for a few minutes and, oh, what is this… #washingtondc #politics #trump

item.title: Congressman Andy Ogles just said Muslims don't belong in American society and that "pluralism is a lie.” Another congressman said something similar. These aren’t dog whistles anymore. They’re airhorns. And notice the silence from GOP leadership. If a libe
item.description: Congressman Andy Ogles just said Muslims don't belong in American society and that "pluralism is a lie.” Another congressman said something similar. These aren’t dog whistles anymore. They’re airhorns. And notice the silence from GOP leadership. If a libe

item.title: I went to Capitol Hill to defend the Johnson Amendment, which is under attack by Christian Nationalists. Thanks to the Secular Coalition for America for setting up the visits! #atheism #politics #JohnsonAmendment #christiannationalism #CapitolHill
item.description: I went to Capitol Hill to defend the Johnson Amendment, which is under attack by Christian Nationalists. Thanks to the Secular Coalition for America for setting up the visits! #atheism #politics #JohnsonAmendment #christiannationalism #CapitolHill

item.title: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has, without explanation, given up on his own lawsuit against the state’s Department of Public Safety, after he claimed they were illegally forbidding religious ads from appearing in the official “Driver’s Handbook.” Turn
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has, without explanation, given up on his own lawsuit against the state’s Department of Public Safety, after he claimed they were illegally forbidding religious ads from appearing in the official “Driver’s Handbook.” Turn

item.title: The Alabama House just passed a bill that would force prayer in public schools. Even with the bill’s caveats, this is nothing more than another attempt to shove Christianity where it doesn’t belong. #ChristianNationalism #Education #Atheist #Atheism #Pol
item.description: The Alabama House just passed a bill that would force prayer in public schools. Even with the bill’s caveats, this is nothing more than another attempt to shove Christianity where it doesn’t belong. #ChristianNationalism #Education #Atheist #Atheism #Pol

item.title: An Indiana judge recently ruled that the state’s near-total abortion ban violates the religious rights of people whose faith requires them to support abortion access. Religious freedom just backfired on conservative Christians! #abortion #religion #polit
item.description: An Indiana judge recently ruled that the state’s near-total abortion ban violates the religious rights of people whose faith requires them to support abortion access. Religious freedom just backfired on conservative Christians! #abortion #religion #polit
